metadata.title: Alcotheque : Wine & Spirits Collection Manager | iOS App
metadata.description: Scan, organize and track your wine and spirits collection with AI. Manage your cellar, gift tracking and analytics. Free on iPhone.
metadata.ogTitle: Alcotheque : Your wine & spirits cellar on iPhone
metadata.ogDescription: Scan your bottles, organize your collection, and track every gift with artificial intelligence.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: The only app that manages your wine AND spirits. Where Vivino stops, Alcotheque keeps going.

scan.title: AI Bottle Scanner
scan.text: Point your camera at any label. Alcotheque instantly reads the name, vintage, type and value for you.

wineSpirits.title: Wine AND Spirits
wineSpirits.text: Vivino and CellarTracker stop at wine. Alcotheque manages your whisky, rum, gin and every spirit too.

gifts.title: Gift Tracking
gifts.text: Who gave you what, and when? Never forget a gift or give the same one twice.

value.title: Collection Value
value.text: What is your collection worth? Get an instant estimate without opening a spreadsheet.

locations.title: Location Management
locations.text: Cellar, cabinet, holiday home. Always know where every bottle is.

languages.title: 7 Languages
languages.text: Available in 7 languages for collectors around the world.

hero.tagline: Wine & spirits. Your cellar, your gifts. Never forget a bottle.
hero.subtext: Do you know what your collection is worth? Scan your bottles, track your gifts and manage wine and spirits in one place.
hero.ctaAria: Download Alcotheque on the App Store

schema.description: Premium iOS app to manage wine and spirits collections: scanning, organizing, and AI-powered tracking.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Alcotheque.

q1.question: What is Alcotheque?
q1.answer: Alcotheque is an iOS app to manage your wine and spirits collection. Scan your bottles with AI, organize your cellar by location, track your collection value and keep a history of every gift received.

q2.question: Is Alcotheque free?
q2.answer: Yes, Alcotheque is free to download. The free version lets you manage up to 15 bottles. The Premium subscription at $0.99/month gives you unlimited bottles, locations and scans.

q3.question: What devices does Alcotheque work on?
q3.answer: Alcotheque is available on iPhone and iPad running iOS 17 or later. iCloud sync keeps your collection up to date across all your Apple devices.

q4.question: How does the AI bottle scanning work?
q4.answer: Simply take a photo of your bottle label. The AI automatically recognizes the name, type, vintage and estimated value. You can then edit the information before saving.

q5.question: Does Alcotheque manage both wine AND spirits?
q5.answer: Yes, that is what sets Alcotheque apart from competitors. The app manages over 30 drink types: red, white and rosé wines, champagnes, whiskies, rums, gins, cognacs, vodkas and much more.

q6.question: Is my data secure?
q6.answer: Yes. All your data is securely stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) and synchronized in real time. Your collection is protected and accessible only from your account.

history.question: Can I track the complete history of my bottles?
history.answer: Yes. Alcotheque records the full history of each bottle: purchase date, opening, tasting, gift given or received. You get a complete timeline for every bottle in your collection.

cta.title: Your cellar deserves better than a spreadsheet.
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of collectors who manage their wine and spirits with Alcotheque.
cta.ctaAria: Download Alcotheque on the App Store
cta.footnote: Free up to 15 bottles. iOS 17+. No commitment.

footer.tagline: Your wine & spirits collection, always with you.
footer.storeLinkAria: Download Alcotheque on the App Store

pain.text: Forgotten who gave you that bottle of whisky? Most collectors rely on a spreadsheet, a paper list, or nothing at all. There is an app for that.
